channel.title: TEC on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in TEC on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Speaker - Immersive Intelligent World - TEC-WG Meeting
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Being a member of the Metaverse-related Working Group at the Telecom Engineering Centre (TEC) under the Department of Telecommunications (DoT), Ministry of Communications, Government of India, I had the privilege of speaking on the topic: “Immersive Intelligent World – The Shift We Are Living Through” My talk focused on how the metaverse is shaping the future of the internet, and how we can begin preparing for this transformation today.
